message:
feat(focus): expand tab navigation, host-focus guard paths, and focus recovery

FocusManager:
- Tab navigation (focus_next/focus_prev) extracts first/last from tab
  order into named locals for clarity and adds additional guard paths
  for host-unfocused state
- push_trap, pop_trap, and repair helpers gain consistent host_focused
  checks — when the terminal is backgrounded, these methods blur instead
  of attempting focus restoration that would create invisible state
- Additional test coverage for trap push/pop edge cases with unfocused
  host

ModalFocusCoordinator:
- Minor adjustments to align with the updated FocusManager guard API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
